_comment_security: SECURITY WARNING: Never put API keys, tokens, or secrets in this configuration file!
_comment_paths: IMPORTANT: Replace /YOUR/... placeholders with actual absolute paths on your system
_comment_no_shell_expansion: Note: $HOME and other shell variables do NOT expand in JSON config - use absolute paths
_comment_deny_lists: Always use deny lists to protect sensitive files like .env, credentials, SSH keys
_comment_minimal_config: This is a reference example with 4 portable MCP servers - only add what you need

filesystem._comment: Replace paths with your actual Obsidian vault and projects directory

sqlite-ledger._comment: Optional: Persistent structured storage via SQLite

obsidian._comment: Optional: Direct Obsidian vault access (replace path with your vault)
